title: When do Americans vote for the next president?
shortDescription: U.S. voters will be heading to the polls or mailing their presidential ballots in less than eleven weeks.

title: Trump NY sentencing delay request helped by Manhattan DA response
shortDescription: Manhattan District Attorney Alvin Bragg signaled openness to former President Donald Trump's request for a delay in his hush money criminal sentencing

title: Who will win the 2024 election? What the polls say ahead of DNC
shortDescription: Ahead of the DNC, many recent polls show Harris ahead in national polls and nearly tied in key swing states.

shortDescription: A month after bowing out of his campaign for reelection, President Joe Biden will speak at the Democratic National Convention in Chicago.

title: Dramatic election may mean good things for DNC TV ratings
shortDescription: After a surprising election turnabout with Kamala Harris taking the reins from Joe Biden, the DNC could see higher Nielsen ratings this year.

title: Trump's immigration agenda: End natural-born citizenship
shortDescription: One of Republicans biggest talking points in the 2024 election is immigration. Donald Trump has proposed several policy ideas. Here is what to know.

title: From Delaware to DC: The key moments on Joe Biden's political life
shortDescription: President Joe Biden is expected to make his political swan song at the DNC Monday night. Here's what you need to know about his career.

title: As Democrats kick off convention, GOP unveils Biden impeachment report
shortDescription: House Republicans have released their Biden impeachment report accusing the president of "egregious" corruption, which he has repeatedly denied.

title: Democratic convention brings out the stars in hopes of winning votes
shortDescription: DNC hopes John Legend and Octavia Spencer will outshine the RNC's Kid Rock and Hulk Hogan.

title: Why some Democrats are skipping the DNC in Chicago
shortDescription: Sens. Jon Tester, Sherrod Brown and Jacky Rosen are among the Democrats in tough 2024 races who are staying away from the Windy City and the DNC.
